headline: Who Will Win the Midterm Elections? The Energy Sector.
summary: With the midterm elections a little more than six months away, people are already placing their bets on which political party will come out ahead and what it will mean for businesses and the economy.  Democrats’ successful effort to redistrict Virginia congressional maps in their favor on Tuesday underscores the intensity with which political parties are looking to gain an edge ahead of the critical votes.  Now Morgan Stanley analysts have released their first take on what either a Democratic sweep of Congress—currently favored on prediction markets—or Republicans maintaining control would mean for various business sectors.
